creator: jeremy@external.org
text:
Report Magic is a post-processor for the Analog web log analyzer.

It produces reports and graphs that greatly improve those which 
Analog creates for a more "professional" look.  I would compare
it with Webalizer or WebTrends.

It's under the GPL, but Wadsack-Allen, the authors, require it
to be read and agreed to before use.  There is a post-install
target and a pkg-message that echo this requirement.
